CREATE TABLE test_strings (haystack String, needle String);
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES ('ложка, кошка, картошка', 'КА');
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES ('Яблоко, Груша, Вишня', 'ЯБ');
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES ('тест тестирования теста', 'ТЕСТ');
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES ('abc ABC Abc', 'abc');
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES ('длинная строка для теста', 'ТЕ');
SELECT haystack, countSubstringsCaseInsensitiveUTF8(haystack, 'ТЕСТ') AS occurrences FROM test_strings WHERE occurrences > 0;
SELECT haystack, countSubstringsCaseInsensitiveUTF8(haystack, needle) AS occurrences FROM test_strings GROUP BY haystack;
SELECT haystack, countSubstringsCaseInsensitiveUTF8(haystack, 'к', 1) AS k_count FROM test_strings WHERE k_count > 0;
SELECT countSubstringsCaseInsensitiveUTF8(haystack, needle) FROM (SELECT haystack, needle FROM test_strings WHERE length(haystack) > 10);
SELECT countSubstringsCaseInsensitiveUTF8(haystack, 'т', 1) FROM (SELECT haystack FROM test_strings) t1;
SELECT haystack, countSubstringsCaseInsensitiveUTF8(haystack, 'д') as occurrences FROM test_strings WHERE occurrences < 5;
